name_cn:
🎉New Arrival Crossbody Bag🎉🎉1BC169A🎉🎉
This Cheo shoulder bag features imported glossy cowhide leather, and can be carried by hand or on the shoulder. It features a front lock closure. Exuding refined charm, the unique shape design is both cool and stylish. It has ample capacity and is lightweight, making it perfect.🎉 Hurry and get yours, babies!🎉🎉 A timeless bestseller that will never go out of style🎉🎉
22x18.5x4.5cm🎉🎉🎉
